issues.description: TrashFromHand is optional ("You may trash"), but DSL does not capture the conditional logic. Effect should use a condition or optional flag.

SearchDeck is incomplete. Missing: (1) look at 5 cards (not search entire deck), (2) filter for exactly [Mont Blanc Noland] OR {Shandian Warrior} types, (3) reveal up to 2 cards, (4) place rest at bottom in any order. Current DSL does not specify count, type filter, or ordering mechanics.
Filter kind="Any" is incorrect. Must filter for cards with type containing "Mont Blanc Noland" OR "Shandian Warrior".
